arts.ttl: Why Mestalla may lie empty for first 19 minutes of Valencia-Real Madrid
arts.sum: For many years now, many Valencia fans have slowly become disillusioned with how the club has been run since Singapore based businessman Peter Lim took control over a decade ago. Friday’s game also marks a debut on the Mestalla bench for new Valencia boss Carlos Corberán with the local born coach ushered in to replace Ruben Baraja who was relieved from his role with the team languishing in the drop zone.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid To Make Another Bid For Trent Alexander-Arnold — Report
arts.sum: With Carlo Ancelotti’s side facing defensive shortages, particularly in the right-back position due to Dani Carvajal’s injury, Madrid are reportedly preparing a second bid for Alexander-Arnold, valued at up to £20 million, according a report by Paul Joyce in The TImes. However, Liverpool have made it clear they are not willing to part ways with their vice-captain, especially in the midst of a fierce Premier League title race under manager Arne Slot.

arts.ttl: Team News: Valencia vs. Real Madrid injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Friday's La Liga clash between Valencia and Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Begins Election Process for Club Presidency in 2025
arts.sum: “The president of Real Madrid, Florentino Pérez, calls the meeting of the club’s Board of Directors on January 7, 2025, at 5:30 p.m., in order to begin the election process for the president and Board of Directors for the next four years.” Florentino Pérez Calls for Early Elections, Set to Seek Another Term as Real Madrid President in 2025

arts.ttl: Thibaut Courtois Calls for Reform in Football’s Grueling Calendar
arts.sum: “If you’re in a team that plays once a week, you don’t understand this calendar problem because you have a game every Saturday and that’s how it is... When you don’t rest, that’s when all the injuries pile up,” he explained.

arts.ttl: Valencia close to loan deal for Real Sociedad star
arts.sum: La Liga rivals Valencia and Real Sociedad are expected to tie up an imminent transfer agreement. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo, citing journalist Héctor Gómez, who points towards Umar Sadiq…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid already 1-0 up against Messi in Club World Cup
arts.sum: Two weeks after FIFA began selling tickets for the 2025 Club World Cup, a clear favourite has emerged: Real Madrid . Only a few seats remain for Real Madrid’s opening match - on June 18 against Al Hilal.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to hold elections: the near-impossible requirements you need to run
arts.sum: The statement specified that the election process will formally begin next week, on January 7, at 5:30 p.m. This marks the start of the procedure for electing the club’s new president and Board of Directors. Real Madrid have initiated the process for convening the next elections for its presidency and Board of Directors.

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold makes two Liverpool demands to reject Real Madrid transfer
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's future remains up in the air, but it appears the England international is giving Liverpool the chance to keep hold of him beyond the summer

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti’s ‘New Year’s resolution’ is focused on one Real Madrid star
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach is ready to focus his full efforts on aiding one member of his squad in efforts to rediscover his best form this year. That’s according to…
